layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: THREE-COLUMN COMPARISON TABLE layout with a full-width title at the top, followed by a unified comparison table spanning the full slide width. The table is structured as three equal-width columns (Criteria, Athena, Best-of-breed) with a fourth narrow column for cost data. All columns share identical row heights, creating a strict horizontal alignment across the entire table. A full-width footer bar sits at the bottom containing strategic takeaway text. The layout uses generous padding on all sides, with the table filling the vertical space between title and footer. The design follows the Flat Geometry Table pattern (Section 4 Option C) due to the formal/decision-making nature of the content: no filled header bars, accent tabs beneath column headers, grey-filled label cells in the Criteria column, and thin dashed grey separator lines between all rows.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 4
  Allocation: [0.15, 0.28, 0.42, 0.15]

Containers:
  C1 (SLIDE TITLE): Full-width title area at the top of the slide. Text: '2. Recall: We evaluated 2 options for AI platforms and have finalized our decision to take a best-of-breed platform approach'. Font: heading font, brand primary color, left-aligned. Height: 15% of slide height maximum. Clear vertical gap below the title before the table begins.
  C0 (CRITERIA COLUMN (LEFT LABEL COLUMN)): Leftmost column of the comparison table, containing row labels for evaluation criteria. Width: 15% of table width. Structure: Column header 'Criteria' in bold, brand text color, left-aligned, followed immediately by a thin accent tab (brand primary fill, narrow width, top corners rounded, bottom square) left-aligned beneath the header text, with a solid horizontal line (brand dark color, thin) spanning the full column width directly below and touching the accent tab. Below the header: five row sections with equal flexGrow values. Each row section contains a light grey filled rectangle (no border, no rounded corners, spanning most of the row height) with bold text left-aligned and vertically centered: 'Speed to market', 'Accuracy', 'IP ownership', 'Long-term fungibility & viability', 'Total cost of ownership'. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines between all row sections (not after the last row). All row top and bottom edges must align exactly with the corresponding rows in columns C2, C3, and C4.
  C2 (ATHENA COLUMN (MIDDLE CONTENT COLUMN)): Second column of the comparison table, containing evaluation details for the Athena option. Width: 28% of table width. Structure: Column header 'Athena' in bold, brand text color, left-aligned, followed immediately by a thin accent tab (brand primary fill, narrow width, top corners rounded, bottom square) left-aligned beneath the header text, with a solid horizontal line (brand dark color, thin) spanning the full column width directly below and touching the accent tab. Below the header: five row sections with equal flexGrow values matching C0. Each row section contains body text (body font, brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset) describing Athena's characteristics for that criterion. Content uses native PowerPoint bullet points where the source has multiple points per row. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines between all row sections (not after the last row), positioned at identical vertical positions as in C0. All row top and bottom edges must align exactly with C0, C3, and C4.
  C3 (BEST-OF-BREED COLUMN (RIGHT CONTENT COLUMN)): Third column of the comparison table, containing evaluation details for the Best-of-breed option. Width: 42% of table width (largest column due to higher content volume). Structure: Column header 'Best-of-breed' in bold, brand text color, left-aligned, followed immediately by a thin accent tab (brand primary fill, narrow width, top corners rounded, bottom square) left-aligned beneath the header text, with a solid horizontal line (brand dark color, thin) spanning the full column width directly below and touching the accent tab. A light blue background fill (very light tint of brand primary) spans the entire column from top to bottom, providing visual emphasis for the recommended option. Below the header: five row sections with equal flexGrow values matching C0 and C2. Each row section contains body text (body font, brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset) describing Best-of-breed characteristics for that criterion. Content uses native PowerPoint bullet points where the source has multiple points per row. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines between all row sections (not after the last row), positioned at identical vertical positions as in C0 and C2. All row top and bottom edges must align exactly with C0, C2, and C4.
  C4 (COST DATA COLUMN (RIGHTMOST NARROW COLUMN)): Fourth column of the comparison table, containing cost comparison data. Width: 15% of table width. Structure: No column header text (empty header space matching the height of headers in C0, C2, C3 to maintain alignment). Below the header space: five row sections with equal flexGrow values matching all other columns. Only the fifth row (corresponding to 'Total cost of ownership') contains visible content: two sub-sections stacked vertically within that row, separated by a thin horizontal dashed grey line. Top sub-section contains Athena cost data ('Higher ongoing run-rate cost (~$700K annually)' and 'Lower upfront build cost (~$700K one-time)'), body font, brand text color, left-aligned. Bottom sub-section contains Best-of-breed cost data ('Lower ongoing run-rate cost (~$450K annually, ~$110K without Graph database and Graph visualization)' and 'Higher upfront build cost (~$900K one-time)'), body font, brand text color, left-aligned. The first four rows are empty (transparent spacers). Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines between all row sections (not after the last row), positioned at identical vertical positions as in all other columns. All row top and bottom edges must align exactly with C0, C2, and C3.
  C5 (FOOTER BAR (STRATEGIC TAKEAWAY)): Full-width footer bar at the bottom of the slide, below the comparison table. Height: compact, just enough to contain two lines of text with small vertical padding. Fill: light brand accent color (soft tint, not saturated). No border. Text: two bullet points in body font, brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset. First bullet: 'The strategic platform decision must align strongly to business priority, valuing quality, precision, and extensibility above speed-to-market as a standalone metric'. Second bullet: 'A custom Azure agentic framework optimizes for sustained accuracy, adaptability, and long-term economic and strategic resilience'. Small footnote text at the very bottom left: '1. In addition, Graphine, an agentic accelerator, will provide Antares an LLM R&D platform for continuous LLM and token usage optimization', body font reduced size, light grey color.
  C6 (HEADER ANNOTATION (TOP RIGHT LABEL)): Small label element positioned at the top right of the slide, adjacent to the title area. Two text items stacked vertically with minimal gap: 'Recommended path forward' (body font, brand text color, bold) and 'Deep-dive follows' (body font, light grey color, regular weight). This element sits above the Best-of-breed column, visually associating the recommendation label with that column. No background fill, no border. Positioned with a small margin from the top and right edges of the slide.
